description: Chrome extension that transforms browsing into certified knowledge on the Intuition protocol. AI workflows classify intent, pin URLs to IPFS, and create atoms/triples.

atomTypes.label: URL
atomTypes.description: Web page URL pinned via IPFS as certified knowledge

atomTypes.label: Intention
atomTypes.description: Browsing intent classification (learning, work, fun, buying, inspiration, music)

atomTypes.label: Skill
atomTypes.description: User competency derived from browsing and AI analysis

atomTypes.label: Certificate
atomTypes.description: On-chain browsing certification proving knowledge acquisition

atomTypes.label: TrustCircle
atomTypes.description: Group of mutually trusted users forming a reputation cluster

predicates.label: certifies
predicates.description: User certifies a URL as valuable knowledge

predicates.label: has intention
predicates.description: URL is classified with a browsing intention

predicates.label: has theme
predicates.description: URL is tagged with an extracted topic

predicates.label: trusts
predicates.description: User places trust in another user

predicates.label: distrusts
predicates.description: User expresses distrust toward another user

predicates.label: has skill
predicates.description: User has demonstrated competency in a skill area

predicates.label: in circle
predicates.description: User belongs to a trust circle
